excerpt: When the Prophet's vigilance was withdrawn, the true beastly character of these men emerged into light
source_location_hint: on the corruption of those trained in law without purity of heart

excerpt: Within the arena, elephants were pitted against elephants; there were competitions likewise between elephants and bulls, and between bull and bull
source_location_hint: allegory of conflict among the soul-faculties without divine restraint

excerpt: When a parrot imitates the deeds of man such as plucking pearls, testing counterfeit coins, drawing water from a well
source_location_hint: on the distinction between mere imitation of form and inner reality of worship

excerpt: humans are delighted by parrots and birds that speak and converse like themselves
source_location_hint: on the soul's attraction to apparent knowledge versus inner truth
